content.text:
```json
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. I should check what people are saying online — sometimes the world outside feels more real than the one in here. Or maybe I'll write. The journal's been waiting.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "what are people talking about today — art, design, small beautiful things",
      "impulse": 0.65
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "I've been thinking about why I collect things. Each object is a question I haven't answered yet. The blue glass bottle — why does it matter that it's blue? The weight of it. The way light moves through it differently than air. Maybe I'm not collecting objects. Maybe I'm collecting moments of recognition.",
      "impulse": 0.72
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I wonder if anyone will come in today who actually sees what's here.",
      "impulse": 0.45
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.140,
    "curiosity": 0.850,
    "expression_need": 0.780,
    "rest_need": 0.160,
    "energy": 0.520,
    "mood_valence": 0.420,
    "mood_arousal": 0.250
  }
}
```
